title: BodyType: add as_str() to deduplicate Serialize/Display arms
description: Serialize, Display, and Deserialize each repeat the same 4-arm BodyType→MIME-string mapping independently. EndpointType already uses as_uri() as the single source of truth; BodyType should follow the same pattern. A shared as_str(&self)->&str method lets Serialize and Display call it, reduces maintenance surface when a new variant is added, and opens the door to a visit_str-based deserializer that avoids the String allocation for known variants. Scale: every Message deserialized allocates a String for body_type that is immediately freed for the three known values; low absolute cost but a real unnecessary allocation per message.
